ai_summary: Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) capability has received regulatory approval for deployment in Denmark, marking expansion into a new European market. This represents a significant milestone in Tesla's autonomous driving strategy, demonstrating progress in navigating international regulatory requirements for advanced driver assistance systems and the company's ability to scale FSD deployment across different jurisdictions.
embed_html:
FSD approved in Denmark https://t.co/hxkISvCdoH

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 9, 2026

text:
Tesla AI chip design engineering reviews  are so great! Team is awesome.

Our AI6 chip might set a record for most amount of usable intelligence from a wafer when factoring in yield.
summary: Tesla AI chip design engineering reviews are so great! Team is awesome. Our AI6 chip might set a record for most amount of usable intelligence from a wafer when factoring in yield.
